narrative:
Monroe Twp township has 1,994 registered voters, with 44.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 45.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 35.3 percentage points.
